Interface IMultidimensionalInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control a multidimensional info value object.

[Guid("583C9454-50F0-4DEF-BAD5-C9B39ADD39D2")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMultidimensionalInfo

Methods

Add(IMultidimensionalInfo) 

void Add(IMultidimensionalInfo pMdInfo)

Parameters

pMdInfo IMultidimensionalInfo

AddDimensionValue(string, string, double, double)

Adds a new value range along the specified dimension associated with the specified variable. To indicate a point (and not an interval) along the dimension, ensure maxDimensionValue equals minDimensionValue.

void AddDimensionValue(string bsDimensionName, string bsVariableName, double minDimensionValue, double maxDimensionValue)

Parameters

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string
minDimensionValue double
maxDimensionValue double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConvertDimensionValueToString(string, string, double)

Returns an appropriate textual representation of the specified dimension value.

string ConvertDimensionValueToString(string bsDimensionName, string bsVariableName, double dimensionValue)

Parameters

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string
dimensionValue double

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConvertStringToDimensionValue(string, string, string)

Returns the numeric form of the dimension value given it's textual representation.

double ConvertStringToDimensionValue(string bsDimensionName, string bsVariableName, string bsDimensionStringValue)

Parameters

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string
bsDimensionStringValue string

Returns

double

Sample Snippet

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string

void DefineVariable(string bsVariableName, IPropertySet pVariableAttributes)

Parameters

bsVariableName string
pVariableAttributes IPropertySet

GetDimensionAttributes(string, string)

Returns the attributes corresponding to the specified dimension associated with the specified variable. Fails if the dimension associated with the variable hasn't been defined.

IPropertySet GetDimensionAttributes(string bsDimensionName, string bsVariableName)

Parameters

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetDimensionNames(string)

The set of dimension names associated with the specified variable.

IStringArray GetDimensionNames(string bsVariableName)

Parameters

bsVariableName string

Returns

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string
ppMinDimensionValues IDoubleArray
ppMaxDimensionValues IDoubleArray

GetVariableAttributes(string)

Returns the attributes associated with the specified variable. Fails if the variable hasn't been defined.

IPropertySet GetVariableAttributes(string bsVariableName)

Parameters

bsVariableName string

Returns

IPropertySet

The set of all variable names.

IStringArray GetVariableNames()

bsVariableName string

RemoveDimension(string, string)

Removes all attributes and values corresponding to the specified dimension associated with the specified variable.

void RemoveDimension(string bsDimensionName, string bsVariableName)

Parameters

bsDimensionName string
bsVariableName string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveVariable(string)

Removes all attributes, dimensions, and dimension values associated with the specified variable.

void RemoveVariable(string bsVariableName)

bsVariableName string
